description: Add Day 2 challenge documentation to README and create a CHALLENGE-DAY2.md document explaining the Human-in-the-Room Directives feature and its challenge scope
steps: Create CHALLENGE-DAY2.md at the project root documenting: what the Day 2 feature is (Human-in-the-Room Directives), how it extends the existing RepoScope architecture, the demo scenario, event model changes, and that this feature was built during the Kiro Birthday Challenge Day 2 window
Add a Day 2 section to README.md (after the Hackathon Submission section) with a brief explanation of the new feature, a link to CHALLENGE-DAY2.md, and the Kiro challenge badges/positioning
Include demo commands in CHALLENGE-DAY2.md: how to start the app, create a session, add a directive, and observe the result
Include a 60-90 second demo script in CHALLENGE-DAY2.md
acceptance_criteria: CHALLENGE-DAY2.md exists with clear explanation that this is the Day 2 feature, not the entire RepoScope product
README.md has a new Day 2 section that links to CHALLENGE-DAY2.md
Demo commands are documented and realistic
Social post with required hashtags is included
verification: Read both files to verify markdown structure and content completeness
